race.comment: BUTWEDID (5) took advantage of the good draw and landed on the pace last start before tiring to finish fifth, beaten 2.75 lengths, over 1400m at Gatton. Sure to give backers a sight and will take some beating. COOL MUSIC (10) resumes today after filling a minor placing at her last appearance at Ipswich over 1680m on April 21. Should be hard to stop while fresh. BLACK 'N' DEADLY (19) tasted defeat last start when fifth over 1200m at Beaudesert, beaten 5 lengths. Perfectly placed and is sure to play a pivotal role. DOITLIKEMAXWELL (6) gets the reliable Webster/Tilley combination and can feature despite the wide draw.
